overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting students in dark robes gathered in a covered wooden pavilion with open archways leading to green gardens. The camera remains stationary, capturing the medieval-style architecture and ambient character animations in high-fidelity Unreal Engine rendering.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval-style wooden pavilion where students in dark academic robes gather around study tables. The space features heavy timber architecture with an open front revealing lush gardens. Characters move subtly within the frame, conversing and examining materials on the tables, while warm natural light filters through the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, atmospheric view of a medieval academic sanctuary where the interior architecture blends seamlessly with the surrounding nature. It begins within a heavy timber pavilion, focusing on students in dark academic robes as they gather around study tables. As the characters subtly converse and examine their materials, the camera captures the interplay of warm natural light filtering through the wooden beams. The scene then expands toward the open front of the structure, revealing a transition from the shaded interior to the vibrant greenery of the lush gardens beyond.
